title: floury polish potatoes bake
description: a comforting, cheesy dish featuring floury potatoes that's perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: wash and peel the potatoes, then cut them into 1-inch wedges.
place the potatoes in a large bowl and drizzle with melted butter, then sprinkle with flour, salt, and pepper.
toss the potatoes to coat evenly, then spread them out in a single layer on a baking sheet.
roast the potatoes in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until they start to brown.
remove the potatoes from the oven and sprinkle with grated cheese and chopped scallions.
return the potatoes to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
remove the potatoes from the oven and let them cool in an ice bath for 5 minutes to stop the cooking process.
drain the potatoes and serve hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
if using beer, stir it in along with the grated cheese and chopped scallions.
do not overmix the potatoes, as this can cause them to become sticky and difficult to handle.
